metadata.title:
AT RAID JAPS MIGHT


BE STOLEN

pages.raw_text:
SPRAGUE, Wash, March Ii -
Sprague experienced genuine JAP
anese invasion Saturday afternoon.
About so of the little brown men
were brought here in Northern Pa
cific outfit cars and sidetracked
awaiting orders.


They are part of 300 who were
shipped in from the east by the N.
p. to recruit the extra gangs next
summer. When they reached Spo-
kane there were no tools available,
and they were shipped out to vari.
GUS points along the main line to
be held until the necessary picks
and shovels can be provided.


The Northern Pacific's reasons
for sending them out of Spokane
was to prevent other roads from
winning them away before arrange
ments for putting them to work
could be made.
